zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar於1347年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire奧特豪斯時，他的父親Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar.28歲，母親Christina Keith28歲。他和Isabel Ramsay至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1391年在英國蘇格蘭安格斯享年44歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培爾姆藍。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar was born in 1347, in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar., was 28 and his mother, Christina Keith, was 28. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Isabel Ramsay. He died in 1391, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Moulin, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar est né en 1347, à Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar., avait 28 ans et sa mère, Christina Keith, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Isabel Ramsay. Il est décédé en 1391, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Moulin, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar 1347 in Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. 28 und seine Mutter Christina Keith 28. Er hatte mit Isabel Ramsay mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1391 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Moulin, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar è nato il nel 1347 nel Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar., aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Christina Keith, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Isabel Ramsay. Morì nel 1391, nel Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Moulin, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfarが1347年にスコットランドForfarshireアウチテローウゼで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar.は28歳，母Christina Keithは28歳であった。彼はIsabel Ramsayとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1391年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで44歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアモウリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar(이)가 1347년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 오ch터하스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar.(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Keith(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Isabel Ramsay(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 모우린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar nasceu em 1347, em Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar., tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Christina Keith, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Isabel Ramsay. Ele faleceu em 1391, em Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Moulin, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar родился в 1347 г. в местности аучтироус, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Keith, 28. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Isabel Ramsay. Он умер в 1391 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности моулинь, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar nació en 1347, en Auchterhouse, Forfarshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Walter Ogilvie of Wester Powie, latterly 1st Ogilvie of Auchterhouse - Earl of Powry and Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar., tenía 28 años y su mamá, Christina Keith, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Isabel Ramsay. Murió en 1391, en Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Moulin, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
